section.title: Textbook
section.p: Calculus: Concepts and Contexts, 4th edition, James Stewart.

Our official textbook is out of print, becasue the publisher neglected to inform PCC about that before it was too late. You may be able to find used copies at the bookstore or online. Also the bookstore can sell you electronic access to the textbook. Somehow, some way, you must have access to a version of the textbook. If it is a different edition than the 4th edition, that might be fine. Bring something to me if you'd like to see whether it will work.
Please note that there are many different calculus textbooks written by James Stewart, and many of them will not meet our needs.

We specifically only need the following chapters from Calculus: Concepts and Contexts, 4th edition:
Chapter 9: Vectors and the Geometry of Space
Chapter 10: Vector Functions
Chapter 11: Partial Derivatives
Chapter 12: Multiple Integrals
So check if your version has all of the above. If the version is not exactly the same as Calculus: Concepts and Contexts, 4th edition, then it might have the same content but with different chapter and section numbers.
